business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

positives: Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring
16 years in business with same management
concerns: Plumbing and electrical systems are original (2005)
Building not fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
No quality control / quality assurance program
OSHA citations in the past 3 years
No cyber liability protections in place
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three-year claim history: 11 claims in 2024 (Travelers), 3 claims in 2023 (Markel), 6 claims in 2022 (Zurich, with cancellation).

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas. Operates 4 hotels (Austin, San Antonio, Fredericksburg), 3 restaurants, and 1 corporate office totaling approximately 381,000 sq ft across 8 locations. 285 full-time and 165 part-time employees. Annual revenue $42,000,000.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program in place. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors and subcontractors. All premises sprinklered with hard-wired fire alarms and central station monitoring. MSDS maintained. 24-hour doorperson/security on premises.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history: 2024 Travelers ($686,236.25 premium, 11 claims, no cancellation); 2023 Markel ($619,820.26 premium, 3 claims, no cancellation); 2022 Zurich ($607,294.45 premium, 6 claims, policy cancelled). OSHA citations reported within the past 3 years.
